title: Tail Skew Context (design example)

display.headline: SKEW index level: 146.72
display.body: Cboe SKEW tracks SPX tail-skew pricing; higher readings can indicate richer outlier-risk protection pricing.
display.caveat: Display-only tail-skew context. Not VIX, not 0DTE, not dealer gamma, and not a score input.
